headlines.title: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
headlines.description: US President Donald Trump's speech included some of his political agenda but also honoured war veterans and American history.

headlines.title: Tuchel praises respectful Mexico fans amid increased security
headlines.description: Thomas Tuchel dismisses concerns over England's treatment in Mexico, saying it has been "nicer than I expected" and that home fans are "friendly and respectful".

headlines.title: Farage denies rules broken after reports benefits from ally were not declared
headlines.description: The Sunday Times says the Reform UK leader failed to register the support supplied by a man who had been convicted of fraud in the US.

headlines.title: Watch: Lyse Doucet in Tehran as huge funeral for Iran's former supreme leader takes place
headlines.description: Authorities expect up to 20 million people to attend ceremonies across Iran and Iraq over the coming days.

headlines.title: How Iran's new regime is very different to what came before

headlines.title: Police leadership needs 'ethical reset', Lord Blunkett tells BBC
headlines.description: The former home secretary has co-authored a major report that has found the running of forces in England and Wales needs a "fundamental overhaul".

headlines.title: Prince Harry and Meghan: Will they or won't they, and will we care?

headlines.title: Cowboys, fighter jets and US Border Patrol - inside Trump's big recruitment drive

headlines.title: Staying up for the match? How to handle a 1am kick-off

headlines.title: NHS app to use AI to determine which service best for patients
